# Pressense - Strategy & Systems Partner

> We help serious businesses move from scattered growth to structured scale.

## About

Pressense is a strategy and systems consultancy that works with founders, operators, and enterprise teams to fix growth bottlenecks, remove revenue leakage, and build scalable infrastructure.

We do not just advise — we diagnose, fix, and build.

## What We Fix

- Unclear positioning that fails to resonate with buyers
- Scattered sales pipelines with no visibility or accountability
- Marketing that generates activity but not revenue
- Manual workflows that drain capacity and block scale
- Misaligned teams working on disconnected priorities
- Systems and tools that no longer fit the current stage

## How We Work

Our approach follows four phases:

1. Diagnose — Understand what is actually broken through audits, interviews, and data review
2. Build the Plan — Define the fix with clear milestones and ownership
3. Execute — Implement the solution with hands-on involvement
4. Measure — Track impact and iterate based on results

## Services

- Strategy Clarity — Positioning, messaging, GTM strategy
- Revenue Systems — Sales process, pipeline, CRM automation
- Growth Infrastructure — Internal tools, workflows, dashboards

## Engagement Types

- Focused Diagnostic — 2-week deep audit of one constraint
- Strategy Sprint — 4-6 week positioning and GTM overhaul
- Systems Pilot — 6-8 week build and implementation
- Advisory Support — Ongoing fractional strategic guidance

## Who We Work With

- Scaling founders who built something that works and need systems to grow
- Operators and COOs who own execution but need help rebuilding the engine
- Enterprise teams with strategy that exists but execution that is stalled

## Contact

To work with us, apply at: https://v0-pressense.vercel.app/apply
